title: Weapons
description: Schema for the Wardice weapons data file. Each key is a camelCase weapon ID.

weapon.title: Weapon
weapon.description: A single weapon entry used by one or more model profiles.

type.description: Whether the weapon is used in melee or at range.

name.description: Display name of the weapon (e.g. 'Death Kiss', 'Necrocannon').

location.description: Mount location on a warjack chassis (e.g. 'L' for left arm, 'R' for right arm).

quantity.description: Number of identical weapons of this type the model carries (e.g. 2 for dual-wielding).

statistics.description: Numerical combat stats for this weapon.

range.description: Effective range of the weapon. Integer for standard ranges; string for special values like 'Sp 8' (spray) or 'CTRL' (control range).

rateOfFire.description: Number of shots per activation (ranged weapons only). Integer for fixed values, string for dynamic values like 'D3' or 'D3+1'.

areaOfEffect.description: Blast radius in inches for AOE weapons (e.g. 3 means 3" AOE).

power.description: Damage roll value. Integer for standard weapons; string for split-damage notation like '14/8' (direct hit / blast).

abilities.description: Special rules that apply to this weapon. Can be a flat list of ability IDs, or a list where each element is either an ability ID (string) or a mutually-exclusive ability group (array of strings — the player must choose one).

oneOf.description: A mutually-exclusive ability group — the first element is typically the group type (e.g. 'attackType') followed by the selectable options.

weaponGroup.description: Named weapon section such as mounted or dismounted. Each property is a weapon id.
